calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-26-2017 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-02-2017 Set For Trial On Jan-22-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion To Compel Deposition Of Plaintiff And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-17-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jason Kort, of Dolan Law Firm, Tel. 415.421.2800, for plaintiffs;
Ryan Gille, of Law Offices of Kuluva, Armijo & Garcia, Tel. 415.273.6506, for defendants.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, MARKET MASON ASSOCIATES, LLC Motion To Compel Deposition Of Plaintiff is granted. Plaintiff shall appear for a videotaped deposition. Sanctions are granted in the amount of $1,950 against plaintiff. Prevailing party shall prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge Pro Tem: Bruce Highman; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-18-2017 Set For Trial On Nov-27-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Feb-01-2017 Off Calendar
